BoTorch
=======

# Available modules


The overview below shows which BoTorch installations are available per HPC-UGent Tier-2 cluster, ordered based on software version (new to old).

To start using BoTorch, load one of these modules using a `module load` command like:

```shell
module load BoTorch/0.16.1-foss-2024a-CUDA-12.6.0
```

*(This data was automatically generated on {{modules_last_updated}})*
